name: Whitehaven Coal Limited
analysis: Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 55 EMA at A$8.5482. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Trade setup: entry A$8.5482, stop A$7.9398, target A$8.6900. Risk/reward is 0.23:1.
